user.description: Select a discovered BLE LED sign nearby.

bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to set up BLE LED sign {name}?

data_description.retry_count: Number of retries before reporting failure.

write.name: Write Display
write.description: Render a display image from payload elements and send it to the BLE LED sign.

payload.name: Payload
payload.description: Drawing elements. Colors depend on device type: single (off/on), seven (7 colors), colorful (RGB).

background.name: Background
background.description: Background color. Unsupported colors map to the nearest supported color.

threshold.name: Threshold
threshold.description: Luminance threshold for single-color draw bitmap encoding.

invert.name: Invert
invert.description: For single-color devices: when false, brighter pixels are lit (default).

dry_run.name: Dry Run
dry_run.description: Render preview only without sending to the device.

send_text.name: Send Text
send_text.description: Send scrolling text to a BLE LED sign.

text.name: Text
text.description: Text to display on the sign.

color.name: Color
color.description: Text color: name or hex (e.g. ff0000) for full-color drivers; palette name for CoolLED.

bg_color.name: Background Color
bg_color.description: Background color hex (iPixel). Omit for none.

font.name: Font
font.description: Path to a .ttf font (iPixel). Defaults to bundled Galmuri.

save_slot.name: Save Slot
save_slot.description: Store in device slot 1-10 (iPixel). 0 = no save.

send_image.name: Send Image
send_image.description: Send a bitmap image file to a BLE LED sign.

threshold.name: Threshold
threshold.description: Luminance threshold for single-color bitmap encoding.

invert.name: Invert
invert.description: For single-color devices: when false, brighter pixels are lit.

save_slot.name: Save Slot
save_slot.description: Store in device slot 1-10 (iPixel). 0 = no save.

send_animation.name: Send Animation
send_animation.description: Send an animated GIF to a BLE LED sign.

speed_ms.name: Frame Speed
speed_ms.description: Milliseconds between frames. Defaults to the GIF frame delay.

threshold.name: Threshold
threshold.description: Luminance threshold for single-color bitmap encoding.

invert.name: Invert
invert.description: For single-color devices: when false, brighter pixels are lit.

save_slot.name: Save Slot
save_slot.description: Store in device slot 1-10 (iPixel). 0 = no save.

send_jt.name: Send JT Program
send_jt.description: Send a CoolLED JT program file (graffiti or animation).

set_icon.name: Set Built-in Icon
set_icon.description: Show a built-in icon by ID on the BLE LED sign.

set_music.name: Set Music Bars
set_music.description: Show an 8-bar music equalizer pattern on the sign.

send_command.name: Send Control Command
send_command.description: Send a low-level control command to a driver that supports it (e.g. iPixel Color: clock, scoreboard, countdown, DIY mode).

command.name: Command
command.description: Command name (e.g. clock, scoreboard, countdown, diy_mode, sport, eq).

value.name: Value
value.description: Optional argument(s): a single number, or a list for multi-argument commands.
